name: io.github.Muvon/octocode
description: AI-powered code indexer with semantic search and knowledge graphs

tools.name: semantic_search
tools.description: Search codebase using semantic search to find relevant code snippets, functions, classes, documentation, or text content. This tool finds code by understanding what it does, not by exact symbol names. Use descriptive phrases about functionality and behavior, not function names or single words.

oneOf.description: Single search query - use for specific conceptual searches
Array of related search terms for comprehensive results

query.description: Search query(s) - prefer array of related terms for better results

mode.description: Scope of search to limit results to specific content types

max_results.description: Maximum number of results to return

tools.name: view_signatures
tools.description: Extract and view function signatures, class definitions, and other meaningful code structures from files.

file_path.description: Path to the file to analyze for signatures

filter.description: Optional filter to narrow down results (e.g., function name, class name)
